sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The SPACE presses only changed 1 cell and then 0 cells. The strip didn't extend rightward. This is because the player is at rows 32-35 but the box is at rows 28-31. The strip extends horizontally from the player's position, but the player is not at the same vertical level as the box.
Let me check: when the strip is on the right side of the player, SPACE extends it rightward. But the player is at rows 32-35, and the box is at rows 28-31. The strip would extend rightward at rows 32-35, which is below the box.
I need the player to be at the same vertical level as the box. The box is at rows 28-31. If I move UP, the player goes to rows 28-30 (or similar), which overlaps with the box.
But wait - the player is 3 columns wide (cols 12-14 after moving LEFT). The box is at cols 16-19. They don't overlap horizontally. So moving UP should be fine - the player would be at rows 28-30, cols 12-14, and the box is at rows 28-31, cols 16-19. No overlap!
Let me try: UP (strip above), then LEFT (strip to right)... no, that moves the player left.
Actually, I need to:
1. Move UP to align vertically with the box (rows 28-30)
2. Move LEFT to put strip on the right side
3. SPACE x3 to extend strip rightward toward box
4. Move RIGHT (toward center)
But wait, after moving UP, the strip is above the player. Then moving LEFT puts the strip on the right side. But the player moves left, so the strip is now at the player's right edge.
Let me think step by step:
- Current: Player at cols 12-14, rows 32-35 (after LEFT then RIGHT, back to cols 13-15... wait, let me check)
Actually, the last action was RIGHT, which moved the player from cols 12-14 back to cols 13-15. Strip is now on the left (col 12).
Let me try: UP, LEFT, SPACE, SPACE, SPACE, RIGHT.
After UP: player at rows 28-30, cols 13-15. Strip above at row 27.
After LEFT: player at rows 28-30, cols 12-14. Strip on right at col 15.
SPACE x3: extend strip rightward from col 15 toward box at cols 16-19.
RIGHT: move toward center.
But wait, the strip is 4 cells tall (matching player height). When extended rightward, it would be at rows 28-30, extending from col 15 rightward. The box is at rows 28-31, cols 16-19. The strip would touch the box at col 16.
Let me try this!

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content: World model: Strip didn't extend rightward because player was at wrong vertical level (rows 32-35 vs box at rows 28-31). Need to align vertically first. Player at cols 13-15 doesn't overlap with box at cols 16-19, so moving UP is safe.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Align vertically with box, then extend strip rightward
action(['UP', 'LEFT', 'SPACE', 'SPACE', 'SPACE', 'RIGHT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
